evals.prompt: I need to add a dark mode toggle to the settings page in the web app
evals.expected_output: Triages as quick tier. Generates only task-list.md with inline requirements. Does NOT generate FRD, FRS, GS, or TR. Asks 2-3 lightweight clarification questions, confirms scope with user before generating.

evals.prompt: We need to add file upload support — users should be able to attach files to workflow steps. The files need to go to S3, and the API needs new endpoints for upload/download.
evals.expected_output: Triages as standard tier. Generates FRD.md, TR.md, and task-list.md. Does NOT generate FRS.md or GS.md. Research includes Memory Bank check and documentation fetch. Confirms scope before generating.

evals.prompt: Build a team collaboration feature with role-based permissions — team owners can invite members, assign roles (viewer, editor, admin), and control who can edit workflows vs just view them. Needs audit logging for compliance.
evals.expected_output: Triages as full tier. Generates all 5 files: FRD.md, FRS.md, GS.md, TR.md, task-list.md. Deep research phase with Memory Bank, documentation, and codebase analysis. Confirms scope before generating. May suggest team mode given complexity.
